send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

conversation.message_text: Comfrt: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Comfrt.
Comfrt: Welcome to Comfrt! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/TiI
Comfrt: Welcome to the Comfrt family! Your discount code is Comfy10. Click here to auto-apply it and shop now: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aArRYTi0hqv6 .
Comfrt: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!

Comfrt: 

Hey! We noticed you eyeing our top-selling collection.

 We are almost sold out of your size but wanted to give you a huge discount to join the Comfrt family and 1 million happy customers before it's sold out.

Use COMFY15 for 15% OFF (valid for 24hrs)

 https://comfrt.attn.tv/aQv6OyN8yhME .

Comfrt: Hey Nicole, this is Samantha. Thanks for checking us out! 😊 https://comfrt.attn.tv/aJ6IKKlWJMR3

Text back if you have any questions!
How do i return my clothes that i purchased

Comfrt: I'm so sorry about that. You can start a return here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aqvmJfb5JeON/#/ You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aLC0x57Lj87W Please let me know if you have any questions.
Where can we find the order number for a return

Comfrt: You can find the order number in the order confirmation email that you must have received upon completing your order. 
Please make sure to check your spam and promo folders, as sometimes the emails can end up there. 

If you can confirm the e-mail address associated with the order you are returning and the order date, I can help you with the order number as well.
The email is not in my spam or promo folder nor my regular email
Comfrt: I'm sorry to hear that! Mind sharing when you placed the order?
I placed the order on Wednesday

Comfrt: Upon checking our records, we do not see an order placed on Wednesday. However, we do have a purchase recorded from Monday. Could you please provide the email address used to place that order? This will help us verify and assist you further.
I placed the order on Wednesday, and the email address was Strunk31810@yahoo.com
Comfrt: Thank you for sharing that with me! The only order I can see is #25462989, placed on July 9th under the email you provided. Hope this helps!
That 25462989 number is my order number?
Comfrt: Yes, that's the order number for your most recent order. Hope it helps.
Thanks
Keeps saying order not found
Comfrt: Sorry to hear that! I'm afraid, the image is not showing on my end. Mind sending it again?

Comfrt: My apologies for the inconvenience, the image is still not showing. However, you can try order #462989, which I can see an update for on my end: on July 10th the label was updated to "On its way". Please give it another try using the number above and let me know if you need any further help.
Thanks for your help, However the number is still not working

Comfrt: Can you try following this link instead? https://comfrt.attn.tv/aRdpJqQKz3t3

If you're still unable to show the update I mentioned, the best way to handle this is to email us directly at info@comfrt.com. Our team is happy to help!
After I click the link what do I do from there?
This is where im at

Comfrt: Sorry, but I can't view the image. Can you send it again? The link contains the order number that you can use to start the return process. By the way, have you already sent us an email? Our team is doing everything to respond to each inquiry in a timely manner. They should follow up with you in no time!
I don't know why but that order humber continues not to work.
Comfrt: Are you getting a specific error message when trying to check the order number? Send a screenshot of what you're seeing.

Did you have questions about this fan fave product? Let me know and I can help answer.
I emailed this to Laneige email, but I figured this is faster.

Hello. Today I received an order I had placed, and we are absolutely ecstatic!!! My daughters and I have had the BEST time unboxing everything this evening and we could NOT be happier with everything we have tried so far. I am actually messaging you, however, because after going through all of the items, we came up one item short. We can not locate the 25 ml toner sample anywhere... We each went through every box and bag and just can't find it anywhere. The other small issue is that the pump we ordered to go with the full sized toner does not fit this toner bottle. My husband even tried to get it to work since he apparently didn't believe myself or any of our three daughters knew what we were talking about... lol!!! I am so sorry to be such a bother, but is there any way you could help? We would all sincerely appreciate absolutely any help or advice at all you could possibly share with us! Thank you so much! Hope to hear from you soon!💖☺️😀❤️🫶

conversation.message_text: illCurrency: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/bvz
illCurrency: Hey this is Jordan, how can I help you?
Hello I had accidentally put the wrong shipping address for my order
illCurrency: I can check if it's possible to edit your order. Please provide your order number, email address, billing zip code, and payment method used.
And need it shipped to 1600 oak lead Dr Green Bay Wisconsin 54304

illCurrency: Thank you for providing the details. Could you also please provide me with your order number and email address? I'll look into this with my team and get back to you as soon as I have more information.
S180372 is the order number and email is ronshonia.griffin@siu.ex's and billing zip code is 54304 and payment method is ending with 7533
the order number is S180372 and email address is ronshonia.griffin@siu.edu
I spent $40.98 and really need that fixed in the system
I ordered it to a school that I'm not going to anymore
that was my old shipping address because I was going to school there
I'm at home and 8 hours away
I just made the order
Can you please get that changed for me

illCurrency: Thank you for providing the details. I've forwarded them to our team, and I'll let you know as soon as I hear back from them. If you have any other questions or concerns in the meantime, feel free to let me know.
Can you tell me how long it would take please ?
I need this fix before tomorrow
Can you please get that changed

illCurrency: I understand. I'm afraid, I can't give you a specific timeframe for our team's response. I'm afraid, I only have limited access to our system, so I may not be able to change that. It's a little late, so I won't likely hear back by today, though rest assured I'll reach out once business hours resume. Let me know if you have further questions.
I will like to get their number please I just need my shipping address changed please
illCurrency: Got you. You can reach out to them by emailing them directly at support@illcurrency.com or giving them a call at 717-947-7883. Our team is happy to help!
That's not even the number
I need my shipping address changed

illCurrency: We have already sent your new address to the team, and I'm actively waiting for their response. I'll let you know immediately once I hear back from the team. You can also send our team an email directly.
When will my order get to me please ?
I need my shirt here 3-4 business days
Not 10-20 business days please

illCurrency: Our processing time usually takes 2-5 business days and once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders. You can track your order here: https://illcurrency.attn.tv/afF6-6V3qets
So would my order get to me in 2-5 business days or 3-5 business days
illCurrency: Your orders will be processed in 2-5 business days, and once shipped, you will receive your order in 3-5 business days. Hope this clarifies it.
Okay it is possible for my order to still come to the right shipping address which is 1600 oak leaf Dr Green Bay Wisconsin 54304
Helloooo

illCurrency: The order will go directly to the shipping address provided at the checkout page. I understand that you urgently want to get your shipping address changed and rest assured, our team is doing everything to respond and resolve each inquiry in a timely manner. They should follow up with you in no time!
Okay could you text my phone and send a email when the shipping address has been changed to the correct address
illCurrency: Yes! Absolutely. I'll be reaching out via text once our team responds. In the meantime, would there be anything else you might need help with?
I got 32 points from you guys is that for me to replace my order ?
How do I use the points ?
Or is they gone change my shipping address

illCurrency: Upon checking, your order is still confirmed and not cancelled. Our team is still actively working on it to make sure that we resolved this matter. As for the points you have, you can click the illCurrency Loyalty Program button on the lower right-hand corner of our website to be taken to your Loyalty Program homepage (please remember to log in!). There, you can choose to redeem your points for coupons or other discounts valid towards a future purchase. I hope this clarifies.
So it for the order I purchased or no
Hello
illCurrency: I'm really sorry for the confusion and for the wait! The points you received are for the order you just placed. Whenever you place an order, you'll get 1 illPoint for every $1 spent.
But I spent $40 on the shirt

illCurrency: Sorry for the confusion, the price of the shirt is $31.99 while the $8.99 was for shipping that's why you only received 32 points. I hope this clarifies everything. In the meantime, is there anything else I may help you with?
Yes so do I need to reorder the shirt to the right address
why is my shipping address has not changed yet and I just updated it
Can I use my $47 to pay for the shirt
Or I don't need to because the address will be changed?
Hello
I need to know what's going on
Template used: "Cancel Order"; last updated: 2025-07-23 13:51:31.865
Template used: "How do I redeem my points?"; last updated: 2023-01-02 23:39:11.717

illCurrency: You can also just place a new order to the right address while waiting for our team's response to ensure that you will receive it soonest. 

If you prefer to cancel the existing order, I can forward the request to the team. Please note though that we charge a 30% re-stocking fee for all cancellations. If you don't want to be charged 30% re-stocking fee, I suggest waiting for our team's response if the address on the existing order can still be corrected. 

No worries, we process orders during business days so it won't ship out during the weekend. 

The points can be redeemed on your next purchase. Just click the illCurrency Loyalty Program button on the lower right-hand corner of our website to be taken to your Loyalty Program homepage (please remember to log in!). There, you can choose to redeem your points for coupons or other discounts valid towards a future purchase.
